title: Redstone Utilities
description: Redstone Utilities provides the best mods for technical Minecraft players while simultaneously providing the best possible performance.
body:
What is Redstone Utilities?

Redstone Utilities is a modpack designed to improve redstone building and technical gameplay in Minecraft. It includes a range of small, helpful mods that make working with commands, NBT data, and redstone systems easier and more efficient. Features like better command input, improved command block interfaces, and detailed tooltips help streamline complex builds and reduce the time spent on technical setup. The modpack focuses on quality-of-life improvements for players who work with redstone and commands regularly.


Mods

Technical Mods (13) - [Better Command Block UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui) by Tec - [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)* by altrisi (Original gnembon) - [Carpet Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-extra)* by altrisi (Original gnembon) - [Carpet TIS Addition](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-tis-addition)* by fallen-breath - [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) by masady - [Litemoretica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litemoretica)** by earthcomputer - [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) by masady - [NBT Autocomplete](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-autocomplete) by mt1006 - [NBT Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbttooltip) by zabi94 - [TweakerMore](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakermore) by fallen-breath - [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) by me4502 - [Pistorder ](https://modrinth.com/mod/pistorder) by fallen-breath - [G4mespeed](https://modrinth.com/mod/g4mespeed) by G4me4u
Performance Mods (14) - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3 - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) by FlashyReese - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by FlashyReese - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by jellysquid3 jellysquid3 - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by comp500 - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by ishland - [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) by ishland - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by juliand665 - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by tr7zw - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by malte0811 - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by RaphiMC - [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)** by embeddedt - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) by FX - [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) by ishland
Other Mods (4) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Prospector - [Ping View](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-view) by karlsson1000 - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) by dzwdz - [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) by keksuccino
Library Mods (5) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by modmuss50 - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by shedaniel - [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) by keksuccino - [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) by masa - [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody) by keksuccino
Resource Packs (2) - [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks) by RexxStone - [XK Redstone Display](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xk-redstone-display) by XeKr

* Note, these mods are intended for single-player use only. If you wish to play on a server, you'll need to install the Carpet Mod on the server. ** Note, these mods are currently disabled as the author of those mods didn't update them to the current Minecraft version.
